title: Rate-Limit Requests with HAProxy Annotation
description:
## Rate-Limit Requests with HAProxy Annotation

HAProxy Ingress can enforce request rate limits at the ingress layer using annotations — no sidecar or application changes required.

**Your task:**

An `Ingress` named `api-ingress` already exists in the `haproxy-lab` namespace. Annotate it to:
- Limit each client IP to a maximum of **10 requests per second** (`haproxy.org/rate-limit-period: 1s`, `haproxy.org/rate-limit-requests: '10'`)
- Enable the rate-limit feature (`haproxy.org/rate-limit-status-code: '429'` to return HTTP 429 on breach)

```bash
# Verify:
kubectl get ingress api-ingress -n haproxy-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.annotations.haproxy\.org/rate-limit-requests}'
```

hints.title: Annotating an existing Ingress
hints.body: Use kubectl annotate to add multiple annotations at once. Dots in annotation keys must be escaped with backslash when used on the command line.
hints.command:
kubectl annotate ingress api-ingress -n haproxy-lab \
  haproxy.org/rate-limit-period='1s' \
  haproxy.org/rate-limit-requests='10' \
  haproxy.org/rate-limit-status-code='429'

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: api-ingress
  namespace: haproxy-lab
spec:
  ingressClassName: haproxy
  rules:
  - http:
      paths:
      - path: /api
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: api-svc
            port:
              number: 80
EOF

validation.description: Check that the rate-limit annotations are present on api-ingress
